overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring a rural farmstead and surrounding prairie. The character walks along wooden fences past sheep enclosures and barns, encounters a horse rider at a farm entrance, and continues into open grasslands crossing a shallow stream.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm pasture with wooden fencing and sheep enclosures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden fence line on farm property, observing the sheep enclosures

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing inside the fenced enclosure

entered.detail: weathered wooden split-rail fence running parallel to the path
fenced pen containing several white sheep grazing on grass
tall metal windmill with spinning blades against the sky
large wooden barn with sloped roof and weathered planks
two-story wooden farmhouse with dark roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wooden fence line on a rural farm property, with sheep grazing in enclosures to the left. A tall windmill and wooden barns stand in the background under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm entrance with dirt road crossing

events.description: horse rider passes by on the dirt road from center to right

agents.ego_description: approaching the farm entrance and crossing the dirt road where a rider passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting along the dirt road

entered.detail: wooden gate structure marking the farm entrance
unpaved dirt road crossing the path through the farm

segments.scene_description: Approaching the farm entrance where a dirt road crosses the path. A rider on horseback passes by on the road as the camera moves through the gate area, transitioning from the fenced pasture to the open entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland beyond the farm

events.description: exits farm property and enters open prairie with tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking forward into the open prairie, leaving the farm structures behind

entered.detail: broken-down wooden shed with collapsed roof sections
expansive field of tall green grass stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving past a dilapidated wooden shed into the open prairie. The farm buildings recede into the background as tall grass surrounds the path, with the windmill still visible in the distance.

events.description: begins crossing shallow stream with water visible on the ground surface

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and crossing a shallow stream in the open prairie

entered.detail: narrow creek with clear shallow water cutting through the grassland
mature oak tree with spreading branches on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through tall prairie grass and crossing a shallow stream. A large oak tree stands prominently to the right as the terrain becomes damp, with the farm windmill no longer visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured rural farmstead into the wild, open expanse of the prairie. It begins by tracking along a wooden fence line past grazing sheep, with barns and a tall windmill standing under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As the camera approaches the farm entrance, the path crosses a dirt road where a rider on horseback passes by, marking the transition from the fenced pastures to the open gateway. The scene then shifts past a dilapidated wooden shed as the farm buildings recede into the background and the landscape opens into fields of tall grass. Finally, the camera moves through the dense prairie vegetation and crosses a shallow stream beside a prominent oak tree, leaving the distant windmill behind as the terrain becomes damp.
